reasoning: I will vote AITC because Mamata didi has kept her word—no NRC in Bengal. I am Bengali, born here, my family has always been here, and I do not need papers to prove I belong. That Shantanu Thakur is now their minister shows me what BJP does: they lift up some minorities to make themselves look good, but it is Hindu-first politics, and people like me are not safe in that. One man's crime does not erase what I know: Mamata didi does not call me infiltrator. I will not vote for the party that made me feel like a foreigner in my own village.
primary_drivers: Mamata's promise: no NRC in Bengal—my existential protection
Fear of BJP's 'infiltrator' rhetoric and what it signals for Muslim minorities
Need for dignity and recognition as native Bengali, not as a threat or suspect
